title: AiPathFilterPolicy
description: Policy for AiPathFilter. Delegates to LlmRunner.runWithTemplate() using an AiFilterContext built from the originating PromptContributorContext. The AI executor produces AiFilterResult containing instructions which are applied through the configured interpreter. Requires a PromptContributorContext with OperationContext for LLM dispatch.

filterType.description: Discriminator — always AI for this schema.
